A photo of a Lark Bunting (Female/Nonbreeding male). A bird with compact body, unmistakable black plumage, white wings, brownish upperparts, brownish underparts, white upperwing brownish tail feathers, and brownish coverts.

A photo of a White-throated Sparrow (Tan-striped/immature). A bird with large full body, prominent bright white bill, rounded gray black-and-white-striped head, long legs, long narrow tail, brown upperparts, gray underparts, bright white throat, and bright white eye.

A photo of a Harris's Sparrow (Immature). A bird with large chunky small body, big barrel-shaped chest, round head, long tail, long pink bill, streaky brown black plumage, black bib, gray cheek, gray nape, white belly, and white back.
A photo of a White-crowned Sparrow (Immature). A bird with large small pale pink yellow bill, long tail, and white stripes.

A photo of a Golden-crowned Sparrow (Immature). A bird with large long tail, small black head, seed-eating bill, golden-crowned streaked brown upperparts, smooth gray-brown underparts, black yellow crown, and bright-yellow forehead.
A photo of a Dark-eyed Junco (White-winged). A bird with medium-sized body pale bill, gray body, faint white wingbars, and faint white face.

A photo of a Chipping Sparrow (Immature/nonbreeding adult). A bird with slender body, long tail, medium-sized bill, pale face, black line, pale eye, bright rusty crown, streaked upperparts, and black cap.
A photo of a Scarlet Tanager (Female/Nonbreeding Male). A bird with medium-sized broad body, stocky proportions, thick rounded bill, brilliant red plumage, black olive wings, and black olive tail.

A photo of a Western Tanager (Female/Nonbreeding Male). A bird with stocky yellow-green body, short thick-based bill, medium-length tail, yellow black wings, orange-red head, two bold wingbars, yellow upperpart marking, white lower underparts, and red plumage.
A photo of a Northern Cardinal (Female/Juvenile). A bird with large body, long tail, short thick reddish red-orange bill, prominent crest, brilliant red pale brown plumage, and black face.

A photo of a Rose-breasted Grosbeak (Female/immature male). A bird with stocky medium-sized body, large triangular bill, broad-chested short neck, medium-length squared white tail, black throat, brown heavily streaked flash yellowish plumage, bold whitish stripes, and white patches.

A photo of a Black-headed Grosbeak (Female/immature male). A bird with hefty chunky body, large grayish bill, large black head, short thick neck, short tail, black-and-white wings, brown upperparts, warm orange buff breast, and orange buff side.

A photo of a Blue Grosbeak (Female/juvenile). A bird with stocky body, large triangular bill, rich blue tend plumage, chestnut two dark brown wingbars, chestnut beak, chestnut upperparts, and grayish-buffy lower underparts.

A photo of a Lazuli Bunting (Female/juvenile). A bird with small stocky body, cone-shaped bill, blue warm grayish-brown upperparts, pumpkin-colored pale cinnamon tan breast, white belly, white shoulder, warm grayish-brown wings, warm grayish-brown tail, two buffy wingbars, and tan plumage.
A photo of a Indigo Bunting (Female/juvenile). A bird with small stocky body, short blue tail, short silver-gray bill, indigo blue brown patchy plumage, whitish throat, blue wings, and blue rump.

A photo of a Painted Bunting (Female/juvenile). A bird with medium-sized body, thick seed-eating bill, stunningly colored bright yellow-green plumage, blue head, red underparts, green back, and pale eyering.

A photo of a Bobolink (Female/juvenile/nonbreeding male). A bird with flat head, short neck, short tail, black plumage, white warm buffy brown dark back, white rump, rich buffy nape, dark brown flank, and bold brown stripes.

A photo of a Red-winged Blackbird (Female/juvenile). A bird with stocky broad-shouldered body, medium-length tail, even glossy black crisply streaked dark brownish plumage, red yellow shoulder, and whitish eyebrow.
A photo of a Yellow-headed Blackbird (Female/Immature Male). A bird with large black body, large yellow head, large bill, yellow chest, prominent white patches, black wings, and brown plumage.
A photo of a Brewer's Blackbird (Male). A bird with long legs, long tail, full yellow body, round yellow head, long thick-based beak, glossy black plainer brown plumage, and yellow dark eye.
A photo of a Brown-headed Cowbird (Female/Juvenile). A bird with glossy black rich brown head and dark eye.

A photo of a Hooded Oriole (Female/Immature male). A bird with large body, long rounded black tail, long rounded neck, brilliant black plumage, black throat, black wings, yellow-orange rump, yellow-orange belly, black chest, and white thin wingbars.

A photo of a Bullock's Oriole (Female/Immature male). A bird with medium-sized body, medium-long tail, thick-based sharply pointed bill, bright orange black grayish back, large white white-edged wings, orange black patches, black line, black throat, yellowish-orange head, and grayish coverts.

A photo of a Baltimore Oriole (Female/Immature male). A bird with slender body, long thick-based pointed bill, flame-orange black solid-black grayish head, one white two bold wing bars, black wings, yellow-orange breast, and grayish back.

A photo of a Pine Grosbeak (Female/juvenile). A bird with large plump body, heavy-chested round reddish orange yellow pink head, reddish pink gray plumage, orange yellow reddish pink rump, dark gray wings, white wingbars, and reddish pink belly.

A photo of a Purple Finch (Female/immature). A bird with purple large chunky no red plumage, pink-red head, brown back, white belly, streaked underparts, dark line, streaked side, and streaked throat.

A photo of a Cassin's Finch (Female/immature). A bird with small body, short-medium straight-sided tail, heavy bill, rosy pink brown white crisp plumage, red crown, streaked undertail, and thin white eyering.
A photo of a House Finch (Female/immature). A bird with small body, large beak, flat head, red face, red breast, streaky brown back, streaky brown belly, and streaky brown tail.
A photo of a Red Crossbill (Female/juvenile). A bird with stocky medium-sized body, brick red plumage, yellowish brownish underparts, and brownish olive brown upperparts.

A photo of a White-winged Crossbill (Female/juvenile). A bird with compact medium-sized body, forked rose-pink black tail, forked bill, rose-pink black wings, two white whitish wingbars, and brownish streaked underparts.

A photo of a Lesser Goldfinch (Female/juvenile). A bird with tiny body, stub-billed long pointed glossy black wings, long pointed black tail, bright yellow dull underparts, glossy black cap, white patches, glossy black olive back, large white plumage, and two whitish wingbars.

A photo of a American Goldfinch (Female/Nonbreeding Male). A bird with small head, long black blackish wings, long black tail, bright yellow plumage black forehead, white markings, white patches, black olive upperparts, duller yellow beneath unstreaked brown plumage, and two pale wingbars.

A photo of a Evening Grosbeak (Female/Juvenile). A bird with large heavyset body, thick white black neck, full chest, short tail, yellow black prominent white patches, dark head, bright-yellow stripes, dark eye, gray plumage, white black wings, and white black flank.

A photo of a House Sparrow (Female/Juvenile). A bird with fuller chest, rounded gray head, rounded tail, rounded bill, brightly colored plain buffy-brown buff black brown plumage, white cheek, black bib, rufous neck, and gray-brown underparts.
A photo of a Vermilion Flycatcher (Female, immature). A bird with small stocky body, upright posture, slender brown tail, broad straight bill, brown back, and brown wings.
A photo of a European Starling (Juvenile). A bird with chunky body, blackbird-sized short tail, long slender purplish-green iridescent yellow beak, black fresh brown plumage, and white spots.
A photo of a Fox Sparrow (Thick-billed/Slate-colored). A bird with large round body, large round bill, medium-length tail, rust-brown upperparts, gray head, gray flank, and gray chest.

A photo of a Summer Tanager (Immature Male). A bird with medium-sized chunky big body, large bright yellow-green head, large thick blunt-tipped bill, bright red patchy yellow plumage, bright yellow-green underparts, bright yellow-green back, and bright yellow-green wings.

A photo of a Orchard Oriole (Female/Juvenile). A bird with slim body, medium-length tail, rounded black head, straight sharply pointed black bill, black upperparts, rich reddish-chestnut underparts, black throat, reddish-chestnut patches, black wings, and greenish yellow two white wing bars.

A photo of a Yellow-rumped Warbler (Winter/juvenile Audubon's). A bird with large full body, large head, large bill, long narrow tail, smart gray paler brown plumage, white wings, yellow face, yellow side, and yellow bright rump.
A photo of a Dark-eyed Junco (Red-backed/Gray-headed). A bird with medium small bill, medium small tail feathers, and reddish-brown back.
